summary: Crystal‑clear soundboard recording of an electric April ’83 second set highlighted by a scorching Slipknot!, powerhouse Wharf Rat and the debut crowd‑chanting Not Fade Away.
review: The Miller SBD flac delivers exceptionally clean, balanced audio that lets every nuance of this lively Broome County show shine. The band is on fire – Jerry’s vocals blaze, Phil locks in with thunderous bass drops on Terrapin Station, and the setlist flows from a soulful Wharf Rat to a jaw‑dropping Slipknot! ending with the historic Not Fade Away crowd chant.

ai_rating.rationale: All five reviews are overwhelmingly positive, praising both the superb soundboard quality and the high‑energy performance; weighting (70% show, 30% recording) yields a rating in the top tier.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Super‑clean SBD flac with no reported dropouts or muddiness; reviewers call it one of the best‑sounding 1983 downloads.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Energetic second set that builds from strong vocals on Wharf Rat through a fiery Help→Slipknot! sequence, culminating in a powerful Terrapin and the historic Not Fade Away crowd chant.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Vocals described as "on fire"; thunderous first note of Slipknot! after a flubbed line on Help.
band_member_comments.Phil: In sync with Jerry, delivering “bombs” on Terrapin Station that wowed the audience.
